title: MoreVanillaArmor
body:
[Porting information for 26.1 update](https://wiki.chaotictrials.de/porting/version/26.1/) **[![#StandWithUkraine](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/vshymanskyy/StandWithUkraine/main/banner2-direct.svg)](https://vshymanskyy.github.io/StandWithUkraine)** ![Header](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/morevanillaarmor/header.png) ### Vanilla materials have now a new reason to exist! You have too much redstone or nether quartz? You don't know what you're wasting it on? This mod is the solution!
![Overview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/morevanillaarmor/overview.png) ![Creative Tab](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ChaoticTrials/ModMeta/HEAD/assets/mods/morevanillaarmor/creative_tab.png) ## Materials | Material | Helmet | Chestplate | Leggings | Boots |
